issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' (correct) but the action sequence is wrong. The card says 'place 1 card from your trash' — this is retrieving FROM trash, not discarding TO trash. Should use SearchDeck or similar to move from trash to deck bottom, not TrashFromHand.

Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. The effect places a card FROM trash to the bottom of deck. This should be a custom action or use a different mechanism (e.g., SearchDeck with a trash filter, or a dedicated 'MoveFromTrashToDeck' action). TrashFromHand discards from hand to trash, which is the opposite direction.
Missing cost/condition: the action requires '[Once Per Turn]' activation restriction and a Main phase timing constraint. These should be encoded in the trigger or as a condition.

suggestedDsl.name: ST19-005
suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may place 1 card from your trash at the bottom of your deck: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −1 cost during this turn.
